content_briefs.headline: Content Marketing Automation in 2026: The 3 Tools Killing Manual Workflows (And the 1 Nobody's Using Yet)
content_briefs.hook: While marketers waste 47 hours monthly on content calendars, automation platforms just cracked personalization at scale—and 92% of teams still don't know it exists.
content_briefs.angle: Data-driven teardown of actual ROI from 2026 automation tools with conversion metrics—not vendor fluff. We tested 11 platforms, only 3 delivered positive CAC impact.

content_briefs.headline: We Fired Our Content Team and Revenue Dropped 67% in 30 Days
content_briefs.hook: Everyone's celebrating AI replacing writers, but nobody's talking about the $340K mistake we made last quarter.
content_briefs.angle: Contrarian failure story with data - we tried full AI content, got destroyed, then found the hybrid model that actually scales revenue (50% AI for research/drafts, humans for strategy/conversion optimization)

homepage_headline.A: Replace Your Entire Content Team With 63 AI Bots — $70/Month
homepage_headline.B: Your Content Operation Runs Itself. $70/Month. No Team Required.
homepage_headline.C: 63 AI Bots. $70/Month. The Content Team You Never Have to Manage.

email_subject.C: How we publish daily without a team
